name: Danske Invest - Global Sustainable Future 2
summary: Danske Invest - Global Sustainable Future 2 is an equity mutual fund launched and managed by Danske Capital AS. The fund invests in growth stocks of companies. It was formerly known as Danske Invest - Vaekst. Danske Invest - Global Plus was formed on September 22, 2000 and is domiciled in Denmark. It was formerly known as Danske Invest - Global Plus on October 12, 2010.
